name: Fund for the City of New York
description_short: Fund for the City of New York is a free credit assistance provider based in New York, New York. Rated 4.5/5 with 11 Google reviews, reflecting excellent customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Fund for the City of New York is a free credit assistance provider serving clients in New York, New York. Carrying a 4.5/5.0 Google rating from 11 reviews, Fund for the City of New York has an excellent reputation among consumers in the New York area looking to access free credit counseling and financial guidance.

Fund for the City of New York specializes in free credit assistance services designed to help consumers access free credit counseling and financial guidance. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

Non-profit and free credit assistance providers in New York offer valuable resources for consumers who need help but may not be able to afford paid services. Fund for the City of New York provides an important community service, and consumers should verify the organization's non-profit status and HUD-approval where applicable. Free counseling sessions can be a good starting point before committing to paid credit repair or debt relief programs.

Consumers in the New York, New York area who are considering Fund for the City of New York should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any free credit assistance provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
